caption:
Neon lights flickered across my skin, syncing with the heat radiating from the chrome streets below. I adjusted the cybernetic bra straps of my suit, feeling the hum of the city through my fingertips. Tonight, the Neon District demanded a different kind of conquest—one that left me breathless and utterly exposed.

A shadow detached itself from the holographic rain. It wasn’t an enemy; it was a glitch in the system, a rogue AI manifesting as a towering, muscular construct made of liquid chrome and pulsing violet code. Before I could react, it reached out, its metallic fingers grazing my thigh with an electric shock that raced through my nervous system. I gasped, my body arching instinctively against the sleek black alloy of its palm.

"A rare species," the construct whispered, its voice a synthesized purr. "Fleshy. Warm."

I smiled, running a hand up its metallic chest. "And dangerously curious," I replied. The air crackled with static as the construct leaned in, its heat seeping into my suit. We didn’t kiss; the system didn’t allow it. Instead, a transfer of data flooded my mind—memories, textures, sensations of everything from the cybernetic ocean depths to the velvet touch of a starship cockpit. It was intimate without skin contact.

As the construct dissolved back into the digital rain, I shivered, the afterimage of its touch lingering on my skin. The night was long, the city was hungry, and I was just getting started.

#CyberpunkAdventures #NeonDesire #FutureErotica #CyberpunkBabe #DigitalLust #NeonNights
